title: SLU Celebrates Class of 2026 at Commencement
summary_en: Filmmaker James Gunn urged the new graduates to embrace challenges during his remarks at Saint Louis University's spring commencement ceremony. In front of a packed crowd at Chaifetz Arena on Saturday, May 16, Gunn shared insights from his time at SLU and beyond.
title_cn: SLU Celebrates Class of 2026 at Commencement
